name: Black Bean Soup Spanish Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort and wash the beans.
2. Soak overnight in water.
3. Add bay leaves, celery seed, and celery to a pot of boiling water.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
5. In a separate pan, cook onion and garlic in salad oil until tender.
6. Add the cooked onion mixture and remaining ingredients (except egg and sour cream) to the beans.
7. Simmer for an additional hour or until beans are very tender.
8. Remove bay leaves.
9. Blend or sieve half of the soup through a blender or sieve.
10. Heat the blended portion if necessary.
11. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper, if needed.
12. Serve hot with sliced hard boiled egg and sour cream on top.
